name: Iron Frontier Hero
description: Playable protagonist for Iron Frontier. Old west steampunk gunslinger with rugged frontier gear.

textToImageTask.prompt: Full-body old west steampunk gunslinger, leather duster coat, brass goggles, rugged frontier boots, bandolier, revolver holster, steam canister pack, neutral A-pose, clean background, high detail, multi-view sheet

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Old west steampunk gunslinger character, full body, neutral A-pose, clean silhouette, wearable gear, no weapons drawn

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: weathered leather coat, brass buckles, oxidized copper tubing, dusty cloth, worn boots, steampunk patina, realistic materials

styleTexturePrompts.brass-patina: warm brass hardware with patina, oil-stained leather, soot-dusted cloth, sun-faded bandolier
styleTexturePrompts.dusty-canvas: dusty canvas coat, sunbleached fabric, minimal brass accents, utilitarian frontier gear
styleTexturePrompts.midnight-coat: deep charcoal duster coat, matte black leather, subtle brass trim, understated steampunk details
styleTexturePrompts.copper-oxide: oxidized copper tubing, teal patina accents, rough leather, industrial steam canister pack
styleTexturePrompts.railroad-union: railroad engineer palette, burgundy vest, brass buckles, weathered denim, workman gloves
styleTexturePrompts.frontier-merc: battle-worn leather armor, reinforced shoulder pads, dust-caked boots, pragmatic mercenary vibe
styleTexturePrompts.steam-sheriff: lawman blue coat, brass badge, crisp leather holster, polished boots, steam-era authority
styleTexturePrompts.desert-ranger: sandstone palette, sun-scorched leather, canvas wraps, desert dust, rugged ranger feel
